name: Amaretto Whisper Cheese Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Almonds, finely chopped and lightly toasted
3 Packages Cream Cheese (8 oz each), Softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, chopped toasted almonds, softened butter, and sugar in a bowl. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the heavy cream and amaretto. Mix until light and creamy. Pour over the crust.
3. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 40 minutes. Let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. The filling will not be set yet.
4. In another bowl, mix together the sour cream, sugar, and amaretto until smooth. Spread evenly over the cooled cake.
5. Return to oven and bake for an additional 5 to 10 minutes. The top should still jiggle slightly in the center. Allow the cake to cool completely on a rack before serving.
6. Cover lightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight. When ready to serve, carefully remove from the springform pan and garnish with toasted almond slivers around the outside edge of the cake. Serves 10.
